title: Long-term morphometric and functional outcomes of frontofacial advancement in syndromic craniosynostosis
abstract: Nasopharyngeal airway volume increases in the short and long term following LeFort III, monobloc, and monobloc with LeFort II procedures, even as the midface experiences some long-term sagittal relapse. Each millimeter of sagittal midfacial movement results in 545 mm<sup>3</sup> of airway volumetric increase regardless of osteotomy choice.
